Into the Under
Version 1.4.0 – The Robotic Update Update
Created by Davis Larson

Thank you for downloading Into the Under!!


----------------------------------------------------------------------

HOW TO RUN:

1. Right-click the downloaded .zip file and select "Extract All".
2. Open the extracted folder.
3. Double-click IntoTheUnder.exe to start the game.


----------------------------------------------------------------------

IMPORTANT:

Do not move the IntoTheUnder.exe file out of its folder.
Into The Under requires the other files in this folder to run properly.


----------------------------------------------------------------------

Controls:

W / A / S / D / SPACE - Move
E - Open Inventory
Right Click - Mine
Left Click - Place Blocks
Scroll to switch Inventory Position
ESC - Exit and Save Game


----------------------------------------------------------------------

WINDOWS SMARTSCREEN WARNING:

If Windows says "Windows protected your PC":

1. Click "More info"
2. Click "Run anyway"

This appears because this version of the game is not digitally signed.


----------------------------------------------------------------------

All rights reserved.
This game may not be redistributed without permission.
